exclusions.reason: Transitive through the HarperDB local CLI/runtime. Project code does not extract attacker-controlled tar archives, and the deployed Fabric app is not bundled with this npm dependency tree.

Transitive through the HarperDB local CLI/runtime HTTP server. The deployed Fabric app runs on Harper-managed infrastructure rather than this npm Fastify instance, and project code does not expose a Fastify server.
Transitive through the HarperDB local CLI/runtime. The vulnerable Windows fsSize path is not invoked by project code or by the deployed Fabric app bundle.
Transitive through the HarperDB local CLI/runtime. Project code does not call networkInterfaces with untrusted NetworkManager profile names, and deployed Fabric runtime is managed separately.
Transitive through the HarperDB local CLI/runtime. Project code does not call versions with attacker-controlled locate output, and this dependency is not bundled into deployed app resources.
Transitive through the HarperDB local CLI/runtime. Project code does not call wifi helpers with untrusted interface parameters, and the deployed Fabric runtime is managed separately.

Transitive through the HarperDB local CLI (harperdb > inquirer > external-editor > tmp). Project code does not invoke inquirer / external-editor at build or runtime, and the deployed Fabric app bundle does not include this dependency tree.
